title: Uncertainty-Aware Predicate Grounding via Optimal Transport for Neuro-Symbolic Systems
summary: Successfully generated a publication-ready LaTeX paper (paper.tex) with 11 pages, compiled to PDF (paper.pdf, 2.9MB). The paper includes all required sections: Abstract, Introduction, Related Work, Methodology, ProbLog Integration, Experiments, Discussion, Conclusion, Acknowledgments, and three Appendices. Two figures (fig1_v0.jpg: pipeline architecture diagram; fig2_v0.jpg: epsilon parameter effect) are properly included with \begin{figure*}[!t] for 21:9 aspect ratio figures. The references.bib file contains 14 BibTeX entries fetched via Semantic Scholar API (with 5 manually added entries for papers not found). The paper compiles without errors using pdflatex -> bibtex -> pdflatex -> pdflatex. Visual review of all 11 pages confirmed proper layout with no overlapping figures, cut-off text, or formatting problems. The PDF includes clickable hyperlinks (hyperref package) and properly resolved citations.
